en.editorNote: An official finding that the mess came from inside the platform, not just scalpers, is a vindication moment for fans. Send to a friend who spent years blaming resellers before learning the truth
variations: Lightbulb version: 'I thought the enemy was the guy cutting the line ahead of me. Turns out the enemy was the guy handing out the line numbers.'

items.sourceNote: 票價過高導致需求疲軟,多組藝人因大量空位取消北美巡演場次

zh-tw.content:
票價貴到
連巡演都開始取消,
因為太多位置賣不掉。

搶不到的時候我心碎,
現在賣不掉了我更心碎——

原來不是沒人想去,
是大家都
被價格勸退了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 票價高到巡演因空位取消,是「貴到大家一起放棄」的時代縮影。傳給既搶不到、又買不下手的矛盾朋友
variations: 黑色幽默版:「以前是票太搶手我進不去,現在是票太貴沒人去所以直接取消。兩種我都沒看到,真公平。」

en.content:
Tickets got so expensive
that tours started canceling dates,
because too many seats wouldn't sell.

It broke my heart when I couldn't get in.
It breaks it more now that they can't sell out —

turns out it's not that no one wanted to go.
It's that the price
talked everyone out of it.
en.editorNote: Prices climbing until tours cancel over empty seats captures the 'too expensive, everyone bailed' era. Send to the friend caught between can't-get-in and can't-afford-it
variations: Dark-comedy version: 'Used to be I couldn't get in because it was packed. Now it's canceled because nobody could afford it. Either way I saw nothing — at least it's fair.'

items.sourceNote: 動態定價下,普通座位因隊伍位置與即時需求,價格暴漲到接近 VIP

zh-tw.content:
我只想買最普通的位置。

結果動態定價一漲,
普通座位的價格
直接逼近 VIP。

我付了 VIP 的錢,
換到一個
會自我懷疑「我配嗎」的座位。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態定價把普通座位炒到接近 VIP 價,是「花大錢卻沒比較好」的荒謬。傳給只想低調看場演唱會卻被噴一筆的朋友
variations: 計算版:「普通票 +動態加價 = VIP 票價 -10 元。差那 10 元,剛好是我用來說服自己『還算划算』的精神損失費。」

en.content:
I just wanted the most ordinary seat.

Then dynamic pricing kicked in,
and the ordinary seat
shot up to nearly VIP money.

I paid VIP prices
for a seat that spends the whole show
wondering if it even belongs there.
en.editorNote: Dynamic pricing inflating plain seats to near-VIP cost is the absurdity of 'paid a fortune, got nothing better.' Send to a friend who just wanted a low-key night out and got gouged
variations: Math version: 'Ordinary ticket + dynamic surge = VIP price minus ten bucks. That ten bucks is exactly what I use to convince myself it was still a deal.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋各場開演前 15 天起可至 7-11 ibon 取票；6/18 起陸續開放

zh-tw.content:
終於可以去 ibon 取票了。

我站在機台前,
手抖到輸入訂單編號
打了三次。

搶票時我沒這麼緊張,
反而是票快到手的這一刻,
我怕它是假的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開演前 15 天的 ibon 取票是「終於成真」的儀式時刻。傳給也站在 7-11 機台前手抖的朋友
variations: 務實版:「取票流程三步驟,我做了八分鐘。後面排隊買茶葉蛋的大哥,大概以為我在解鎖核彈。」

en.content:
Finally went to pick up the physical ticket.

Standing at the machine,
my hands shook so hard
I mistyped the order number three times.

I wasn't this nervous fighting for it.
It's now, with the ticket almost in my hand,
that I'm scared it isn't real.
en.editorNote: The will-call pickup is the 'it's finally happening' ritual. Send to the friend whose hands are shaking at the kiosk
variations: Practical version: 'Three-step pickup process. Took me eight minutes. The guy waiting behind me probably thought I was disarming a bomb.'

items.sourceNote: 大巨蛋入場須知:禁帶大面積 LED 燈牌、氣球、橫幅、旗幟等妨礙觀賞的應援製作物

zh-tw.content:
我熬夜做的巨型 LED 燈牌,
入場須知說
「妨礙觀賞,禁止攜帶」。

做的時候是愛,
帶不進去叫違規。

我的應援,
死在大門口。
zh-tw.editorNote: 辛苦準備的大型應援物被入場規定擋下,是開演前最心碎的小事。傳給燈牌剛被沒收、站在門口發呆的朋友
variations: 認命版:「燈牌帶不進去,我就改用手機手電筒。一萬個人的手電筒,也是一萬份不甘心。」

en.content:
The giant LED sign I stayed up all night making —
the entry rules say
'obstructs the view, not allowed.'

Making it was love.
Bringing it in is a violation.

My whole cheer
died at the front gate.
en.editorNote: Having your handmade fan gear rejected at the door is the quiet heartbreak right before showtime. Send to the friend whose light sign just got confiscated
variations: Resigned version: 'Sign won't fit through the gate, so phone flashlight it is. Ten thousand flashlights — also ten thousand servings of regret.'

items.sourceNote: 大巨蛋場內飲食規定:僅看台區開放飲食,搖滾區禁帶飲食、僅能飲水

zh-tw.content:
我搶到搖滾區。

規定:不能吃、不能喝,
只能喝水。

站四小時、不能進食、
只靠一瓶水和信仰撐著——

這不是看演唱會,
這是修行。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搖滾區禁帶飲食、長時間站立是熱情粉絲的甜蜜苦行。傳給準備空腹站四小時的搖滾區戰友
variations: 苦行版:「搖滾區:一瓶水、四小時、零食慾。我以為我來看歌,結果我來閉關。」

en.content:
I scored the rock-zone floor.

The rules: no food, no drinks,
water only.

Four hours standing, no eating,
running on one bottle of water and pure faith —

this isn't a concert.
It's a spiritual retreat.
en.editorNote: No-food rules plus hours of standing in the GA pit are the sweet suffering of die-hard fans. Send to the rock-zone comrade about to fast for four hours
variations: Ascetic version: 'Rock zone: one water bottle, four hours, zero snacks. Thought I came for the music. Turns out I came to meditate.'

items.sourceNote: 詐騙新手法「未來轉票」:聲稱門票會在開演前幾天才寄送,收款後封鎖消失

zh-tw.content:
他說:
「票會在開演前三天才寄,
你先付款卡位。」

我等到開演前三天,
等到開演當天,
等到散場——

等到的不是票,
是我被封鎖的截圖。
zh-tw.editorNote: 「未來轉票」是開演前最猖獗的詐騙:用未來寄票拖延、收款即封鎖。傳給正在跟陌生賣家約「演唱會前再給票」的朋友當解毒劑
variations: 後悔版:「他說票還沒到手、開演前才會寄。我居然信了——原來最先寄到的,是我的智商稅收據。」

en.content:
He said:
'The ticket ships three days before the show,
just pay now to lock it in.'

I waited till three days before.
I waited till show day.
I waited till the lights came up —

what arrived wasn't a ticket.
It was the screenshot of me getting blocked.
en.editorNote: 'Future delivery' is the resale scam peaking right before showtime — stall with a later ship date, vanish after payment. Forward to the friend arranging a 'ticket comes later' deal with a stranger
variations: Regret version: 'He said the ticket wasn't in hand yet, ships before the show. And I believed him — turns out the only thing that shipped on time was my receipt for being gullible.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋預計 16:00 開放入場、18:30 開演;粉絲提早數小時到場排隊

zh-tw.content:
16:00 入場,18:30 開演。

我中午就到了。

為了搶到三小時前的一個好位置,
我把整個下午
站成了一條人龍。

等待的時間,
比我跟前任在一起的時間
還認真。
zh-tw.editorNote: 為了好位置提早數小時排隊,是粉絲心甘情願的傻。傳給也在大太陽下排到中暑邊緣的同伴
variations: 計算版:「提早六小時排隊,看兩小時演唱會。投資報酬率是負的,快樂是正的,扯平。」

en.content:
Doors at 4, show at 6:30.

I got there at noon.

To win a good spot three hours early,
I spent the whole afternoon
becoming part of a human queue.

I waited harder for this
than I ever did for my ex.
en.editorNote: Lining up hours early for a good spot is the devotion fans sign up for gladly. Send to the buddy queuing in the sun on the edge of heatstroke
variations: Math version: 'Six hours in line for a two-hour show. The ROI is negative, the joy is positive, call it even.'

items.sourceNote: 門票各場次開演前15天才開放取票,需至 7-11 ibon 輸入取票序號與號碼列印繳費單再付款領票

zh-tw.content:
票要等開演前 15 天才能取。

搶到那天我哭,
等取票那 15 天我每天再哭一次。

別人是倒數演唱會,
我是倒數一張
還沒摸到的票。
zh-tw.editorNote: 票券要開演前15天才開放取票,搶到後還得焦慮半個月。傳給也在每天數日子等 ibon 取票的朋友
variations: 強迫症版:「搶到票第 1 天到第 15 天:每天打開訂單頁面確認它還在。它一直都在,焦慮的人是我。」

en.content:
The ticket won't release for pickup
until fifteen days before the show.

I cried the day I got it.
Then I cried once a day
for the fifteen days of waiting.

Everyone else is counting down to the concert.
I'm counting down to a ticket
I still haven't touched.
en.editorNote: Some systems hold the ticket until days before the event, so winning it just trades one anxiety for another. Send to a friend refreshing their order page every morning
variations: OCD version: 'Days 1 through 15 after winning: open the order page daily to confirm it's still there. It always is. The unstable one is me.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天 7 月大巨蛋連唱 7 場全數完售;主題《回到那一天》

zh-tw.content:
巡演主題叫《回到那一天》。

結果 7 場全部完售,
我哪一天都回不去。

我唯一回得去的,
是 11:00:00
那個還抱著希望的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 用巡演主題《回到那一天》玩雙關,是五月天粉最高級的自嘲。傳給 7 場全摃龜的朋友當療傷
variations: 感傷版:「《回到那一天》——我最想回到的,是還沒看到『完售』兩個字的那一天。」

en.content:
The tour is called 'Back to That Day.'

All seven nights sold out,
so there's no day I can get back to.

The only moment I can return to
is 11:00:00 sharp —
the me who still had hope.
en.editorNote: Punning on a tour title named for nostalgia is peak fandom self-roast. Send to the friend who struck out on all seven dates
variations: Wistful version: 'Back to That Day — the day I most want back is the one before I saw the words sold out.'

items.sourceNote: 拓元爆大規模鎖帳號,僅因手動 F5 重新整理或操作過快被判定機器人,官方稱停權多為「永久性」且無誤判

zh-tw.content:
我只是按了 F5,
系統判我是機器人,
停權兩個字後面
還加了「永久」。

談過的戀愛都沒這麼絕,
欠的卡費都沒這麼狠,

第一個跟我說永久的,
是售票系統。
zh-tw.editorNote: 「永久停權」的絕情程度遠超人際關係,是 2026 防黃牛機制最荒謬的副作用。傳給剛吃到永久停權的朋友
variations: 心碎版:「這輩子第一個對我說『永久』的,不是誰,是拓元。而且它說到做到。」

en.content:
I just hit F5.
The system flagged me as a bot
and stamped 'permanent'
right after the word 'banned.'

No ex was ever this final.
No credit-card debt this ruthless.

The first thing to ever tell me 'forever'
was a ticketing site.
en.editorNote: A permanent ban for refreshing too fast is the most absurd anti-bot collateral damage. Send to the friend who just got the lifetime suspension email
variations: Heartbreak version: 'First thing in my life to promise me forever wasn't a person — it was the ticket site. And it actually kept the promise.'

items.sourceNote: 實名制下「原價讓票」多為詐騙,第一張票已綁定帳號主人姓名,且 2 張不得退單張

zh-tw.content:
「我多搶了一張,原價讓你。」

聽起來像天使,
其實是漏洞。

實名制下第一張綁的是他名字,
進不去的是你,
錢出去回不來的
也是你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 實名制讓「原價讓票」幾乎必為詐騙——票綁賣家姓名,你拿到也進不去。傳給看到 Threads 私訊讓票心動的朋友當解毒劑
variations: 拆解版:「原價讓票四個字裡,只有『原價』是真的,『讓』『你』『票』都是假的。」

en.content:
'I grabbed an extra one, face value, it's yours.'

Sounds like an angel.
It's a loophole.

Under real-name rules the seat is bound to his name,
so the one who can't get in is you,
and the money that won't come back
is also yours.
en.editorNote: Real-name entry makes 'extra ticket at face value' offers almost always a scam — the ticket carries the seller's name, so you can't enter. Forward to the friend tempted by a too-kind DM
variations: Breakdown version: 'In the phrase extra ticket, face value, yours — only face value is true. Extra, ticket, and yours are all fiction.'

items.sourceNote: 拓元退票政策:購票後3日內(不含當天)可退,每張收票面5%手續費,第4日起不受理,且僅能整筆訂單退票無法單張退

zh-tw.content:
我想退一張票。

系統說:不能單張退,
只能整筆退,
而且每張扣 5%。

搶的時候要全家動員,
退的時候要全家陪葬。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拓元只能整筆退、單張不退的規則讓多人團購卡死。傳給因為其中一人不能去、卻得全團一起退的朋友
variations: 算數版:「退票扣 5%,等於我為了學會『下次別衝動』,付了一筆學費給系統。」

en.content:
I wanted to refund one ticket.

The system said: no single refunds,
only the whole order,
minus 5% per seat.

Grabbing them took the whole family.
Refunding them takes the whole family down with me.
en.editorNote: All-or-nothing refunds wreck group buys when one person can't make it. Send to the friend forced to unwind an entire order over one no-show
variations: Math version: 'A 5% refund fee — basically tuition I paid the system to finally learn don't impulse-buy.'

items.sourceNote: 拓元規定:若因姓名填寫錯誤無法入場,視為個人因素退票,酌收10%退票手續費

zh-tw.content:
我把名字打錯一個字,
現場進不去。

系統說這是「個人因素」,
退票扣我 10%。

一個錯字 10%,
我這輩子的作文
從來沒被扣這麼兇過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 實名制下姓名打錯一字就進不去、還被當個人因素扣 10%,是 2026 最容易踩的雷。傳給填錯資料正在懊悔的朋友
variations: 懊悔版:「少打一個字,賠掉一成票錢。注音選字的那 0.5 秒,是我今年最貴的 0.5 秒。」

en.content:
I mistyped one letter of my name
and couldn't get in.

The system called it 'personal error'
and kept 10% on the refund.

One typo, 10% gone.
No essay I ever wrote in school
got docked this hard.
en.editorNote: Under real-name entry, a single typo can lock you out and cost a 10% refund fee. Send to the friend kicking themselves over a slip in the checkout form
variations: Regret version: 'One missing letter, one-tenth of the ticket gone. That half-second of autocorrect was the most expensive half-second of my year.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋周邊商品開賣,粉絲清晨排隊搶限量周邊;官方應援物品建議官方渠道購買

zh-tw.content:
我搶到票了。

以為苦難結束,
結果還有周邊要排。

清晨五點到場排周邊,
排到中午,
限量款在我前一個人手上
剛好賣完。

命運從不缺席,
只缺我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搶到票只是第一關,限量周邊得清晨再排一次是 2026 真實場景。傳給排周邊排到最後一個剛好賣完的朋友
variations: 認命版:「票搶到、周邊沒搶到。我在這場演唱會的身分,從歌迷降級成『現場見證限量售罄的人』。」

en.content:
I got the ticket.

Thought the suffering was over.
Then came the merch line.

Lined up at 5 a.m.,
stood till noon,
and the limited drop sold out
on the person right in front of me.

Fate never misses.
It just misses me.
en.editorNote: Scoring a ticket is only round one — limited merch means lining up all over again. Send to the friend who got cut off one spot from the last item
variations: Resigned version: 'Got the ticket, missed the merch. My role at this show just got demoted from fan to eyewitness of a sellout.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天 7/3 大巨蛋首場開唱在即;搶到票的粉絲開始倒數,期待與焦慮並存

zh-tw.content:
距離開唱剩 3 天。

我每天打開行事曆看一次,
好像怕它會不見。

搶到票之前,
我倒數的是希望。
搶到票之後,
我倒數的是
終於輪到我的那一天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搶到票後進入幸福倒數,是少數正向的搶票情緒。傳給也在每天數日子等開唱的幸運兒一起興奮
variations: 幸福版:「以前倒數是焦慮,現在倒數是甜的。同樣一個數字往下掉,心情整個翻面。」

en.content:
Three days till the show.

I open my calendar once a day
like I'm afraid the date will vanish.

Before I had the ticket,
I was counting down hope.
Now I'm counting down
to the day it's finally my turn.
en.editorNote: Counting down after you actually got in is one of the rare happy ticket emotions. Send to the lucky friend who's also marking off the days till showtime
variations: Sweet version: 'The countdown used to be anxiety. Now it's sugar. Same number ticking down, totally opposite feeling.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 搶票攻略文揭密「黃牛也在用的搶票工具與技巧」;一般粉絲手動操作難敵自動化

zh-tw.content:
攻略文標題:
「黃牛也在用的搶票神器」。

我認真讀完才發現——

原來我從頭到尾
是用一雙手,
跟一整排機器人賽跑。

難怪我輸得這麼徹底。
zh-tw.editorNote: 一般粉絲手動操作對上黃牛自動化工具,結構性必輸是搶票最深的無力感。傳給堅持純手動卻每次摃龜的朋友
variations: 認命版:「人家用神器,我用手指。這場比賽不是我不努力,是我帶錯了裝備來打仗。」

en.content:
The guide's headline:
'The same bots the scalpers use.'

I read the whole thing
and only then realized —

the entire time
I'd been racing a wall of bots
with two bare hands.

No wonder I lost so completely.
en.editorNote: Manual fans versus automated scalper tools is a structurally rigged race — the deepest helplessness of the ticket era. Send to the purist friend who refuses bots and loses every time
variations: Resigned version: 'They brought software, I brought fingertips. I didn't lose for lack of effort — I showed up to the war with the wrong gear.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7/3 首場開唱前一天;搶到票的粉絲進入開唱倒數的興奮與失眠

zh-tw.content:
明天首場開唱。

我今晚睡不著。

不是焦慮,
是我怕一閉眼,
就把等了兩個月的
那一天
睡掉了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 7/3 首場前夜的失眠是搶到票的人才懂的甜蜜煎熬。傳給也在開唱前一晚翻來覆去的朋友
variations: 務實版:「明天要進場了,我把票、證件、行動電源檢查了 6 遍。第 7 遍純粹是為了再摸一次那張票是真的。」

en.content:
Opening night is tomorrow.

I can't sleep.

It's not nerves.
It's that I'm scared if I close my eyes,
I'll sleep straight through
the day I waited two months for.
en.editorNote: The night-before insomnia only the ticket-holders understand. Send to the friend tossing and turning before the first show
variations: Practical version: 'Checked the ticket, the ID, the power bank six times. The seventh was just to feel that the ticket is real one more time.'

items.sourceNote: 外縣市粉絲痛點:大巨蛋散場時間與大眾運輸末班車對不上,被迫過夜或搶計程車

zh-tw.content:
我搶到票的那一刻超開心,

開心到忘記算,

散場那個時間,
我家方向的末班車
早就開走三小時了。

票有了,
回家的路沒有了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 外縣市粉絲搶到票卻回不了家,是被忽略的隱藏成本。傳給正在查末班車、開始物色過夜旅館的朋友
variations: 算帳版:「票 3200,住宿 2500,計程車 800。這場演唱會的隱藏場次,叫做《我回不了家》。」

en.content:
The second I scored the ticket, I was thrilled.

So thrilled I forgot to do the math.

By the time the show lets out,
the last train home
left three hours ago.

I've got the ticket.
I've lost the way home.
en.editorNote: Out-of-town fans get in but can't get home — the hidden cost nobody budgets for. Send to the friend now pricing hotel rooms at midnight
variations: Tally version: 'Ticket $105, hotel $80, cab $26. The encore to this concert is a bonus track called *No Way Home*.'

items.sourceNote: 開唱前粉絲採買應援物:官方手燈、螢光棒、加購電池,週邊與應援準備成第二輪花費

zh-tw.content:
票花了 3200。

然後官方手燈 990,
加購電池 150,
手燈保護套 280。

進場才發現——

原來票只是入場費,
真正的無底洞
是「想跟大家一起發光」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 應援物採買是搶到票之後的第二波錢包大失血。傳給結帳完手燈才驚覺總支出翻倍的朋友
variations: 認命版:「手燈亮起來的那一刻我確實感動了。感動之餘也想起,這道光是我用信用卡點亮的。」

en.content:
The ticket was $105.

Then the official light stick: $32.
Batteries: $5.
A little case for it: $9.

At the gate I finally got it —

the ticket was just admission.
The real bottomless pit
is wanting to glow along with everyone else.
en.editorNote: Buying the light stick and merch is the second wallet drain after the ticket itself. Send to the friend whose total doubled at checkout
variations: Resigned version: 'The moment the light stick lit up, I got genuinely emotional. Then remembered this glow is powered by my credit card.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7/3-7/12 連唱 7 場,7/12 為尾場;粉絲討論尾場「捨不得結束」的情緒

zh-tw.content:
搶票的時候,
我求的是「拜託讓我進去」。

真的坐進場了,
聽到第一個音,
我開始求的是

「拜託不要結束」。

人啊,
進場前後
是兩種完全不同的貪心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 從搶票的焦慮到現場捨不得結束,是完整走過一輪的粉絲才懂的情緒轉折。傳給進場後開始倒數還剩幾首歌的朋友
variations: 尾場版:「別人在數還剩幾首,我在數還剩幾秒。搶了兩個月的票,捨不得用掉最後一個音符。」

en.content:
During the ticket war,
all I begged for was 'please just let me in.'

Once I was actually in my seat
and heard the first note,
I started begging for

'please don't let it end.'

Funny how the wish flips completely
the second you get through the door.
en.editorNote: The pivot from ticket-war anxiety to not-wanting-it-to-end is what a fan who went the full cycle understands. Send to the friend already counting the remaining songs mid-show
variations: Final-show version: 'Everyone else is counting songs left. I'm counting seconds. Fought two months for this ticket — can't bear to spend the last note.'

items.sourceNote: 大巨蛋 25000 席規模,單日散場人潮湧向捷運;粉絲回報散場排隊出場逾一小時

zh-tw.content:
演唱會 9 點多結束。

我 10 點半
還卡在往捷運的人牆裡。

進場靠搶票,
出場靠緣分。

那晚我學會一件事:
兩萬五千人一起感動,
也要一起排隊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 大型場館散場人潮動輒卡一小時,是進場後另一場硬仗。傳給散場後被困在人牆、還在等捷運的朋友
variations: 認命版:「安可結束是演唱會的高潮,散場排隊才是演唱會的加時賽。這場我打好打滿。」

en.content:
The show ended a little after 9.

At 10:30
I was still wedged in the wall of people
inching toward the subway.

Getting in takes a ticket war.
Getting out takes fate.

That night I learned one thing:
twenty-five thousand people can feel it together —
and then have to queue together too.
en.editorNote: Post-show crowd crush at big venues can trap you for an hour — the other battle after you get in. Send to the friend stuck in the exit shuffle still waiting on a train
variations: Resigned version: 'The encore is the climax. The exit queue is the overtime. I played the full match on this one.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7/3 首場開唱日；沒票的粉絲在社群直播、限動追場外實況

zh-tw.content:
今天首場開唱。

有票的人在大巨蛋。
沒票的我在限動，
一則一則看別人的視角。

我不是在看演唱會，
我是在看一個
差一點就是我的人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 首場當天沒票的人靠追限動過乾癮，是開唱日最真實的落差感。傳給今晚也在滑別人現場影片的朋友
variations: 認命版：「別人在現場尖叫，我在家裡把音量開到最大，假裝隔壁棟就是大巨蛋。」

en.content:
First show is tonight.

The ones with tickets are in the dome.
I'm in the stories tab,
swiping through everyone else's angle, one by one.

I'm not watching a concert.
I'm watching a life
that was almost mine.
en.editorNote: On opening night, the ticketless live vicariously through other people's stories — the sharpest gap of the whole season. Send to the friend also scrolling clips at home tonight
variations: Resigned version: 'They're screaming in the arena. I'm cranking my speakers at home, pretending the building next door is the dome.'

items.sourceNote: 開唱前臨時退補票釋出時間不定，粉絲整天守著拓元頁面盼撿到最後一張

zh-tw.content:
開唱前一天，
聽說會有人退票釋出。

我整天沒關那個分頁，
連上廁所都帶著手機。

我守的不是票，
是那個「說不定」。

人只要還有說不定，
就捨不得登出。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開唱前守退補票是搶票失敗者最後的信仰型行為。傳給也把拓元分頁釘在最上面、一整天不敢關的朋友
variations: 崩潰版：「重新整理第 300 次。我的手指已經有肌肉記憶，我的理智已經沒有。」

en.content:
The day before the show,
word is some returns will drop.

I haven't closed that tab all day.
I take my phone to the bathroom with me.

What I'm guarding isn't a ticket.
It's the maybe.

As long as there's a maybe,
I can't bring myself to log out.
en.editorNote: Camping the return queue before showtime is the rejected fan's final act of faith. Send to the friend who's pinned the ticket tab and refuses to close it all day
variations: Meltdown version: 'Refresh number 300. My thumb has muscle memory now. My sanity does not.'

items.sourceNote: 搶到票的朋友前一晚失眠，擔心當天塞車、證件沒帶、手環發放大排長龍

zh-tw.content:
我搶到票了。

照理說該開心。

結果開唱前一晚，
我把證件、票券、
交通路線查了五遍，

還是失眠到三點。

搶到票不是終點，
是另一種焦慮的起點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搶到票之後的入場前焦慮很少被講，但每個真的去過的人都懂。傳給那個明明搶到票卻在群組狂問流程的朋友
variations: 清單版：「證件帶了、票截圖了、行動電源充飽了、心臟還沒準備好。四項齊三項。」

en.content:
I got the ticket.

By all logic I should be happy.

But the night before the show,
I checked my ID, my ticket,
and the route to the venue five times,

and still couldn't sleep till 3 a.m.

Getting the ticket isn't the finish line.
It's the start of a whole new kind of anxiety.
en.editorNote: The pre-show jitters that hit after you actually win a ticket go unspoken, but everyone who's gone knows them. Send to the friend who scored a seat and is now spamming the group chat with logistics questions
variations: Checklist version: 'ID: packed. Ticket: screenshotted. Power bank: charged. Heart: not ready. Three out of four.'

items.sourceNote: 搶票季結束後，粉絲盤點兩個月來的搶票開銷、請假、失眠，計算「一張票的真實成本」

zh-tw.content:
我算了一下這張票的真實成本：

票錢一份、
代購差價一份、
請假扣薪一份、
失眠三晚一份、
跟朋友借錢的尷尬一份。

加起來，
這張票貴到
我根本不敢跟未來的自己交代。
zh-tw.editorNote: 把一張票的隱藏成本一項項攤開來算，是搶票季尾聲最有共鳴的清算。傳給也開始後悔又捨不得的朋友
variations: 會計版：「表定票價一個數字，實際支出乘三。這門課叫《演唱會經濟學》，學費我還在分期。」

en.content:
I added up the real cost of this ticket:

one part face value,
one part scalper markup,
one part docked pay for time off,
one part three sleepless nights,
one part the awkwardness of borrowing from a friend.

All in,
this ticket got so expensive
I can't even face my future self about it.
en.editorNote: Tallying the hidden line items of a single ticket is the most relatable reckoning at the tail of the season. Send to the friend who's started to regret it but still can't let go
variations: Accountant version: 'Sticker price: one number. Actual spend: times three. The course is called Concert Economics — I'm still paying tuition in installments.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7/3 首場 19:00 開唱；門票開演前 15 天開放取票，需至 7-11 ibon 領票

zh-tw.content:
終於到 ibon 領票了。

螢幕轉圈圈的那三十秒，
我把兩個月來所有的
卡頓、失眠、被停權
又重播了一次。

票單吐出來的瞬間，
我對著那台機器
差點鞠躬。
zh-tw.editorNote: 首場開唱日到 ibon 領票、機器吐票那一刻的情緒最真實。傳給今天終於要進場的朋友幫他集氣
variations: 感恩版：「這輩子沒對一台機器這麼有感情。ibon，是你把我從兩個月的地獄裡撈上來的。」

en.content:
Finally at the kiosk to print the ticket.

In the thirty seconds the screen spins,
I relive every crash,
every sleepless night,
every account ban
from the last two months.

When the slip finally slides out,
I nearly bow
to the machine.
en.editorNote: Picking up the ticket at the kiosk on show day — that moment the machine spits it out — is peak emotional payoff. Send to the friend who's finally getting in tonight
variations: Gratitude version: 'Never felt this much for a vending machine. That kiosk pulled me out of a two-month hole.'

items.sourceNote: 大巨蛋演唱會散場人潮龐大，捷運國父紀念館/市政府站入場管制，網友建議提早或延後離場

zh-tw.content:
散場了。

捷運站在管制，
人龍繞了大巨蛋一圈半。

我搶了兩個月才進得去，
現在得再排一小時
才出得來。

這場演唱會的入場，
跟退場，
一樣不容易。
zh-tw.editorNote: 散場人潮管制是大巨蛋演唱會的隱藏副本。傳給散場後卡在捷運站動彈不得的朋友當同溫層
variations: 認命版：「進場排兩個月，散場排一小時。這場的難度，從頭到尾都很一致。」

en.content:
Show's over.

The subway's on crowd control,
the line wraps around the dome
and a half.

I fought two months to get in.
Now it's another hour
to get out.

Getting into this show
and getting out of it
are equally hard.
en.editorNote: Post-show crowd control at a big venue is the hidden boss level. Send to a friend stuck in a subway queue that isn't moving
variations: Resigned: 'Two months to get in, one hour to get out. This show kept the difficulty consistent, start to finish.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋以侏羅紀為題，13 米巨型恐龍近距離互動、巨幕舞台、巴士環場

zh-tw.content:
燈一暗，
第一個音符出來。

那一秒，
我搶票時罵的髒話、
刷卡時的心痛、
被停權的委屈，

全部一起
變成眼淚流下來。

值不值得這種問題，
只有現在
沒有答案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 終於進場、開場那一秒把所有委屈化成眼淚，是搶票季最好的結局。傳給今晚在場內哭的朋友
variations: 簡短版：「兩個月的地獄，換這三小時的天堂。匯率很爛，但我認了。」

en.content:
The lights drop,
the first note lands.

In that second,
every curse I typed while fighting for tickets,
every sting of swiping the card,
every ban I appealed,

all of it
turns to tears at once.

'Was it worth it' —
right now
that question has no answer.
en.editorNote: Finally inside, and the opening note turns two months of grief into tears — the best possible ending to the season. Send to the friend crying in the stands tonight
variations: Short version: 'Two months of hell for three hours of heaven. Terrible exchange rate. I'll take it.'

items.sourceNote: 沒搶到票的粉絲當天在家看社群直播、追朋友限動，「雲追星」成為主流退路

zh-tw.content:
沒票的今晚，
我在家開著十個朋友的限動
輪流看。

畫面晃、收音爛、
每個角度都不一樣。

但我把它們拼起來，
拼出了一場
只有我自己看得到的演唱會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 沒搶到票用朋友限動「雲追星」拼出一場的畫面很有共鳴。傳給今晚只能在家滑限動的朋友
variations: 拼圖版：「A 的限動有主唱、B 的有大螢幕、C 的全是後腦勺。我這場演唱會是眾籌來的。」

en.content:
No ticket tonight,
so I've got ten friends' stories open,
cycling through them one by one.

Shaky footage, blown-out audio,
every angle different.

But I stitch them together
into a show
only I can see.
en.editorNote: Watching the concert through a dozen friends' stories is the rejected fan's crowd-sourced fix. Send to the friend home alone, thumbing through everyone else's night
variations: Jigsaw version: 'A's story has the singer, B's has the big screen, C's is all backs of heads. My concert was crowd-funded.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天首場結束後，粉絲已開始討論年底其他藝人演唱會售票，搶票循環無止盡

zh-tw.content:
這場才剛結束，
下一個藝人的開賣日
就已經跳出來了。

我的行事曆上，
沒有休息，
只有下一次要拚命的日期。

原來當粉絲，
是一份
永遠不會準時下班的工作。
zh-tw.editorNote: 一場結束、下一場開賣的無限循環是資深粉絲的宿命。傳給今晚剛散場、明天又要開始排下一場的朋友
variations: 循環版：「散場的煙火還沒散，我已經在查下一場的票價。粉絲沒有淡季，只有還沒開賣的季。」

en.content:
This show just ended,
and the next artist's on-sale date
is already blinking on my screen.

My calendar has no rest days.
Just the next date
I'll have to fight for.

Turns out being a fan
is a job
that never clocks out on time.
en.editorNote: The endless loop — one show ends, the next on-sale opens — is the veteran fan's fate. Send to the friend who left tonight's show and is already lining up the next one
variations: Loop version: 'The encore confetti hasn't hit the floor and I'm already checking prices for the next one. Fans don't get an off-season — just seasons that haven't gone on sale yet.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 動態定價爭議：Ticketmaster 依即時需求浮動票價，參議院調查指動態票價 2019-2022 漲逾 700%

zh-tw.content:
我按下購買，
票價 3200。

我遲疑了三秒，
重新整理——

變 4800。

原來猶豫也要收費，
而且是即時計價。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態浮動定價讓「猶豫」變成一種懲罰，是 2026 搶票新怨氣。傳給看著票價一秒一秒往上跳的朋友
variations: 認命版：「不是我買不起，是這系統知道我多想要，然後照著我的渴望開價。」

en.content:
I hit buy.
Price: $105.

I hesitated three seconds,
refreshed —

now it's $160.

Turns out hesitation has a fee,
and it's billed in real time.
en.editorNote: Dynamic/surge pricing turns hesitation into a penalty — the freshest 2026 grievance. Send to a friend watching the price climb by the second
variations: Resigned: 'It's not that I can't afford it. The system just knows how badly I want it and prices my longing accordingly.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 verified fan 雙重驗證：需綁定 email 與手機二次驗證，讓真粉在隊列裡只跟彼此競爭

zh-tw.content:
新制度：
綁 email、綁手機、雙重驗證，
證明我是「真粉」。

我通過了所有驗證。

然後在隊列裡，
輸給另一個一樣真的粉。
zh-tw.editorNote: verified fan 雙重驗證擋掉機器人後，真粉之間的內戰更殘酷。傳給通過驗證卻還是落選的朋友
variations: 戰場版：「機器人被擋在門外了，好消息。壞消息是——現在踩死我的，是跟我一樣愛他的人。」

en.content:
New system:
link your email, link your phone, two-factor verify,
prove you're a 'real fan.'

I passed every check.

Then lost the queue
to another fan just as real as me.
en.editorNote: Verified-fan two-factor keeps bots out, but the fan-versus-fan war is brutal. Send to a friend who cleared verification and still lost
variations: Battlefield: 'Good news, the bots are locked out. Bad news, the person who crushed me loves him exactly as much as I do.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 Face Value Exchange 原價轉售機制上路，仍有票流入 StubHub 等平台被質疑是黃牛繞道

zh-tw.content:
主辦推「原價轉售」，
說要斷了黃牛的路。

結果我上二手平台一看，

同一張票還是加了三倍，
只是黃牛學會了走後門。

道高一尺，
代購一丈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 原價轉售機制立意良善卻被黃牛繞道，是 2026 制度性失望。傳給對「官方防黃牛」還抱期待的朋友當清醒劑
variations: 無奈版：「他們堵住了正門，黃牛就從窗戶進來。這場貓抓老鼠，付錢的永遠是老鼠。」

en.content:
The promoter launched 'face-value exchange'
to cut scalpers off for good.

Then I checked the resale sites —

same ticket, still triple the price.
The scalpers just learned the back door.

Build a taller wall,
they bring a longer ladder.
en.editorNote: Face-value resale programs sound great until scalpers route around them — the systemic 2026 letdown. Send to a friend still hoping 'official' anti-scalping works
variations: Weary version: 'They locked the front door, so the scalpers came through the window. In this cat-and-mouse game, the one paying is always the mouse.'

items.sourceNote: IVE 加場開賣，大量粉絲反映帳號被鎖急求助；拓元聲明「無誤判案例」拒解鎖

zh-tw.content:
我的帳號被鎖了。

系統說我像機器人。
主辦說「無誤判案例」。

所以現在的結論是——

不是我被冤枉，
是我根本不存在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拓元「無誤判」聲明讓被鎖粉絲有苦難言。傳給也收到永久停權通知、正在寫申訴信的朋友當共鳴
variations: 申訴版：「我：我是真人。系統：查無此人。我第一次被官方認證『不像人類』，還是因為手速太快。」

en.content:
My account got locked.

The system says I move like a bot.
The promoter says there are 'no false positives.'

So the official conclusion is —

I wasn't wronged.
I just don't exist.
en.editorNote: Blanket 'no false positives' statements leave banned fans with no recourse. Send to a friend who got a permanent-suspension email for clicking too fast
variations: Appeal version: 'Me: I'm a real person. System: no such user found. First time I've been officially certified as not-human — for being too quick at a button.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天 7/3 重返大巨蛋開唱首場入場資訊；週五場 19:00 開演、需配合安檢

zh-tw.content:
終於進場了。

排安檢排了 40 分鐘，
找座位找了 15 分鐘，
買周邊排了 1 小時。

燈一暗，前奏一下，

剛剛那些排隊，
瞬間都值得了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搶到票的人也要熬過現場排隊。傳給正在大巨蛋外排安檢排到懷疑人生、但知道值得的朋友
variations: 感性版：「排隊兩小時，感動兩小時。這場票的單價，我用心跳分期付清了。」

en.content:
Finally made it inside.

Forty minutes for the security check,
fifteen to find my seat,
an hour for the merch line.

Then the lights dropped, the intro hit —

and every one of those lines
was suddenly worth it.
en.editorNote: Even the fans who got in still grind through venue queues. Send to a friend stuck at the security gate who already knows it'll pay off
variations: Sentimental version: 'Two hours in line, two hours in tears. I paid off this ticket in heartbeats, installment by installment.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋應援規則：禁帶喇叭、擴音器、大面積 LED 燈牌、氣球、橫幅等妨礙觀賞的應援物

zh-tw.content:
我做了一個超大燈牌。
熬夜三天，貼滿亮片。

到門口才發現——

大面積燈牌禁止攜帶。

我的心意通過了安檢，
只是我的燈牌沒有。
zh-tw.editorNote: 現場應援物規則常讓粉絲精心準備的東西被擋。傳給燈牌被沒收、只能空手進場的朋友當安慰
variations: 認命版：「燈牌太大不能帶，聲音太吵不能發，情緒太滿——這個他們管不到。」

en.content:
I built a giant light board.
Three sleepless nights, covered in glitter.

Got to the gate and learned —

oversized boards aren't allowed in.

My heart cleared security.
My light board didn't.
en.editorNote: Venue rules on fan-support props catch a lot of people off guard at the door. Send to a friend whose sign got confiscated on the way in
variations: Resigned version: 'Board's too big to bring, horns too loud to blow, feelings too full — that last one's the only thing they can't confiscate.'

items.sourceNote: aespa 台北大巨蛋 5/17 全面開搶；接續五月天、IVE 後又一場大檔期秒殺

zh-tw.content:
五月天沒搶到。
IVE 沒搶到。
aespa 也沒搶到。

我不是沒運氣，

我是這座城市
所有演唱會的
共同對照組。
zh-tw.editorNote: 連續多場大檔期全軍覆沒是 2026 多棲粉絲的日常。傳給也在同一季連輸三場的朋友當失敗者聯盟
variations: 科學版：「實驗結論：無論歌手、平台、時段，只要我按下購票，售完機率趨近 100%。我就是那個控制變因。」

en.content:
Missed Mayday.
Missed IVE.
Missed aespa too.

I'm not just unlucky —

I'm this city's
official control group
for every concert on sale.
en.editorNote: Whiffing on back-to-back major sales is the 2026 multi-fandom reality. Send to a friend who also went 0-for-3 this season
variations: Scientific version: 'Findings: regardless of artist, platform, or timing, whenever I click buy, sellout probability approaches 100%. I am the constant variable.'

items.sourceNote: Oasis/Coldplay 動態定價爭議：站票原價 £150 排隊排到跳 £350；粉絲不知情被系統臨時漲價

zh-tw.content:
我排進去的時候，
票價是一個數字。

排到我的時候，
票價是另一個數字。

我沒買到票，
倒是親眼看完
一場即時通膨。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態定價讓票價在排隊途中偷偷上漲是海外粉絲近期最大怒火。傳給眼睜睜看著價格翻倍的朋友
variations: 翻譯版：「他們叫它『動態定價』。我叫它『排隊排到我變窮的過程』。」

en.content:
When I joined the queue,
the price was one number.

By the time it reached me,
it was a different number.

Didn't get a ticket.
Did watch inflation
happen in real time.
en.editorNote: Dynamic pricing quietly hiking prices mid-queue is the freshest source of fan rage abroad. Send to a friend who watched the price double while they waited
variations: Translation: 'They call it dynamic pricing. I call it watching myself get poorer in a queue.'

items.sourceNote: Coldplay 開賣：粉絲排隊近 3 小時，排到卻被告知已售完，怒批整套系統是騙局

zh-tw.content:
我排了快三個小時。

排到我，系統說「已售完」。

三個小時，
我從一個充滿希望的人，
排成一個排隊本身的紀念碑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 排隊數小時排到卻沒票是虛擬候位系統最折磨人的結局。傳給剛剛排到終點看見「售完」的朋友
variations: 計時版：「排隊 2 小時 47 分，得到 1 個『售完』。時薪換算下來，我這場排隊還倒貼。」

en.content:
Queued for nearly three hours.

My turn came. The screen said 'sold out.'

Three hours.
I went in a hopeful person
and came out a monument
to standing in line.
en.editorNote: Hours in a virtual queue only to hit 'sold out' is the cruelest ending. Send to a friend who just reached the front of the line for nothing
variations: Timed version: '2 hours 47 minutes queued, one sold out earned. At my hourly rate, I paid to wait.'

items.sourceNote: 拓元大量鎖帳號被炎上後發強硬聲明：截至目前尚無任何經申訴後證實系統誤判之案例

zh-tw.content:
帳號被鎖，我去申訴。

官方回：
「目前尚無任何誤判案例。」

意思是——

系統從不出錯，
出錯的永遠是想看演唱會的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 官方一句「無誤判案例」把所有被鎖的粉絲一律歸為有問題，是搶票季最令人火大的官腔。傳給申訴被打回票的朋友
variations: 翻譯版：「『無誤判』的白話文是：不是系統錯，是你不該手這麼快、心這麼誠。」

en.content:
My account got locked. I appealed.

Official reply:
'No confirmed cases of system error to date.'

Meaning —

the system is never wrong.
The one at fault is always
the person who wanted to see the show.
en.editorNote: A blanket 'no errors on record' statement that treats every banned fan as guilty is peak corporate gaslighting. Send to a friend whose appeal got rejected
variations: Translation: 'No errors detected means: the system's fine, you're just the problem for clicking too fast and caring too much.'

items.sourceNote: IVE 搶票帳號被鎖，粉絲向立委黃捷陳情；立委表示已與文化部及拓元溝通

zh-tw.content:
帳號被鎖，客服不理，
我只好去找立委陳情。

別人陳情是為了居住正義，
我陳情是為了
看一場演唱會的正義。

這個時代，
連追星都要走公民程序。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搶票被鎖到要找立委陳情，是 2026 搶票亂象的荒謬高點。傳給也在群組轉發陳情連署的朋友
variations: 認命版：「陳情信寫到第三段我才發現：我不是在爭票，我是在爭一個當粉絲的基本人權。」

en.content:
Account locked, support ghosting me,
so I petitioned my local representative.

Other people petition for housing rights.
I'm petitioning
for the right to see one concert.

These days,
even stanning requires due process.
en.editorNote: Escalating a locked account all the way to an elected official is peak 2026 absurdity. Send to a friend forwarding a petition link in the group chat
variations: Resigned: 'Three paragraphs into the petition I realized: I'm not fighting for a ticket, I'm fighting for the basic human right to be a fan.'

items.sourceNote: IVE 台北演唱會加場開賣仍瞬間秒殺；加場非但沒緩解，反而再一次全數售罄

zh-tw.content:
我等到了加場。

加場開賣，
一樣秒殺。

原來加場不是多一次機會，
是多一次
把同一個傷口
重新撕開的儀式。
zh-tw.editorNote: 望穿秋水等到的加場照樣秒殺，是搶票失敗者最後希望破滅的瞬間。傳給連加場都沒搶到的朋友當同溫層
variations: 認命版：「首賣秒殺，加場秒殺。他們加的不是場次，是我心碎的次數。」

en.content:
I waited for the added date.

The added date went on sale
and sold out just as fast.

Turns out an extra show
isn't an extra chance —
it's an extra ceremony
for reopening the same wound.
en.editorNote: The long-awaited extra date selling out too is the final collapse of a rejected fan's hope. Send to a friend who missed the added show as well
variations: Resigned: 'First sale: gone in seconds. Added show: gone in seconds. They're not adding dates, they're adding heartbreaks.'

items.sourceNote: IVE 加場開賣，大批粉絲帳號被系統判定異常鎖定，拓元解釋防黃牛演算法標記「不像人類的購票速度」

zh-tw.content:
系統把我的帳號鎖了。
理由是我「不像人類」。

我點得太快、太準、太拚命。

原來這個系統要的
不是真的想看的人，
是一個
剛好不夠努力的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 防黃牛演算法誤鎖真粉是 2026 最新災情。傳給剛剛被判定成機器人、正在急著申訴的朋友
variations: 申訴版：「帳號被鎖，理由『行為異常』。我的異常就是——我太想要了。這也算罪嗎？」

en.content:
The system locked my account.
Reason: I don't 'behave like a human.'

I clicked too fast, too precisely, too desperately.

Turns out the algorithm
doesn't want the fans who care the most.
It wants the one
who tried just a little less hard.
en.editorNote: Anti-bot models flagging real fans for being too eager is the newest wave of pain. Send to a friend mid-appeal after an unexplained lock
variations: Appeal version: 'Locked for suspicious behavior. My only suspicious behavior was wanting it too much. Is that a crime now?'

items.sourceNote: 搶票攻略建議提前註冊主辦會員、訂閱電子報取得預購碼，會員預購成功率是全面開賣的 3 倍以上

zh-tw.content:
攻略說：
提前入會、訂閱電子報，
拿到預購碼，
成功率是全面開賣的三倍。

我照做了。

三倍的機率，
乘上我原本的零。
zh-tw.editorNote: 預購碼提高三倍成功率的攻略人人都會，但底數是零就沒用。傳給照著攻略做還是槓龜的朋友最有共鳴
variations: 數學版：「三倍成功率聽起來很多。可惜任何數字乘我這種手速，都還是回到起點。」

en.content:
The guide says:
join the fan club early, sub the newsletter,
get the presale code,
triple your odds versus general sale.

I did all of it.

Triple the odds,
multiplied by my original zero.
en.editorNote: Presale-code guides promise 3x odds, but 3x zero is still zero. Send to the friend who followed every tip and still whiffed
variations: Math version: 'Triple the odds sounds huge. Sadly any number times my reflexes rounds right back to nothing.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7/3 起開唱，門票開演前 15 天開放取票，可於 7-11 ibon 領實體票

zh-tw.content:
開演前 15 天開放取票，
去 7-11 ibon 領。

我每天走進超商，
站在 ibon 前面，
看別人領票。

我不是來領票的，
我是來練習
那種站在門口卻進不去的感覺。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看別人在 ibon 領票、自己空手是搶票失敗者的日常凌遲。傳給也常經過超商觸景傷情的朋友
variations: 自嘲版：「ibon 我很熟，繳費、寄件、買咖啡都靠它。就是沒領過一次演唱會的票。」

en.content:
Pickup opens 15 days before the show,
at the convenience-store kiosk.

Every day I walk in,
stand in front of the machine,
and watch other people collect their tickets.

I'm not here to pick anything up.
I'm here to practice
that feeling of standing at the door and never going in.
en.editorNote: Watching others print tickets at the kiosk while empty-handed is a slow daily ache. Send to the friend who keeps passing the store and feeling it
variations: Self-roast: 'I know that kiosk well — bills, parcels, coffee, all of it. Just never once a concert ticket.'

items.sourceNote: Live Nation 4 月與華府達成 990 萬美元和解，被控以低價廣告吸引後再加收強制手續費、製造假急迫感

zh-tw.content:
廣告寫的票價，
跟我最後付的票價，
中間隔著一整排手續費。

服務費、系統費、便利費、
還有一個我永遠看不懂的費。

他們最會的服務，
是把價錢藏到最後一頁
才給我看。
zh-tw.editorNote: 廣告低價、結帳暴增的隱藏手續費是跨國通病。傳給結帳畫面被層層加價嚇到的朋友
variations: 帳單版：「票價 1500，手續費 400，我付了 1900，買到一堂『廣告不能全信』的成人課。」

en.content:
The price in the ad
and the price I actually paid
are separated by an entire wall of fees.

Service fee, system fee, convenience fee,
and one fee I will never understand.

Their best service
is hiding the real number
until the very last page.
en.editorNote: Advertised-low, checkout-high drip pricing is a global grievance. Send to the friend who just got ambushed at the payment screen
variations: Receipt version: 'Ticket $50, fees $18, total $68 — and a free adult-education course in Never Trust the Ad.'

items.sourceNote: 付費歌迷會會員（年費約 25-150 美元）成為大型巡演最穩定的預購入場券，免費註冊常被機器人流量淹沒

zh-tw.content:
想搶到票，
要先加入付費歌迷會，
一年繳一筆會費。

免費註冊的通道，
早就被機器人塞爆了。

所以現在連當粉絲，
都有分
付得起的，
跟只能在外面聽的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 付費會員才有穩定預購資格，把粉絲分成兩個階級。傳給不想為了一場票先繳年費的朋友當同溫層
variations: 階級版：「免費粉絲搶剩下的，付費粉絲搶好的，黃牛搶全部的。喜歡一個人，現在也要看預算。」

en.content:
To get a ticket,
you first join the paid fan club
and cough up an annual fee.

The free-signup lane
is already jammed with bots.

So now even being a fan
comes in tiers:
the ones who can pay,
and the ones left listening outside.
en.editorNote: Paywalled fan-club presales split fans into classes. Send to the friend who refuses to pay a yearly fee just for a shot at one show
variations: Class version: 'Free fans get the leftovers, paid fans get the good seats, scalpers get all of it. Loving an artist now comes with a budget line.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 多場演唱會改用動態 QR 電子票，票券 QR 碼定時更新、不可截圖或列印，入場須現場開 App 出示

zh-tw.content:
電子票改成動態 QR。
不能截圖，不能列印，
只能現場開 App 掃。

所以現在進場前，
我最怕的不是查驗，
是我手機剩 3% 的電。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態 QR 電子票不能截圖、要現場開 App，讓入場多一層手機沒電的焦慮。傳給在場外瘋狂找充電的朋友
variations: 焦慮版：「票在雲端，命在電量。1% 的電，扛著我整晚的期待。」

en.content:
Tickets went dynamic-QR now.
Can't screenshot, can't print,
just open the app at the gate and scan live.

So before I go in,
my biggest fear isn't the ID check.
It's my phone sitting at 3%.
en.editorNote: Live dynamic-QR tickets that can't be screenshotted add a whole new layer of battery panic at the door. Send to the friend frantically hunting for an outlet outside the venue
variations: Anxious version: 'Ticket's in the cloud, my fate's in the battery. One percent, holding up a whole night of hope.'

items.sourceNote: 售票平台線上排隊序位不透明，粉絲回報同時進場卻被排到八萬名，家人朋友卻在兩萬與一千名

zh-tw.content:
排隊系統把我排到第八萬名。
我媽兩萬，我朋友一千。

同一個網站、同一秒進場，
它就是把我丟到最後面。

我不是在排隊，
我是被系統挑出來
當那個注定買不到的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 線上排隊的隨機序位決定一切，同時間進場卻被丟到八萬名。傳給每次都排在天邊的朋友討拍
variations: 認命版：「別人排一千，我排八萬。這不是手速問題，是系統從一開始就沒打算讓我進去。」

en.content:
The queue system put me at position 80,000.
My mom got 20,000. My friend got 1,000.

Same site, same second we all clicked in,
and it still flung me to the very back.

I'm not waiting in line.
I've been hand-picked by the system
to be the one who never gets in.
en.editorNote: Randomized queue positions decide everything — same click, wildly different spots. Send to the friend who always lands at the back of the line
variations: Resigned version: 'They got 1,000, I got 80,000. Not a reflexes problem — the system never planned to let me in.'

items.sourceNote: 動態定價使票價隨即時需求上漲，粉絲在排隊過程中票價可漲數輪，選位到結帳時價格已非進場所見

zh-tw.content:
我在排隊，票價在漲。

我還沒進場，它先漲了兩次。
等我終於選到位置，
數字已經不是我看到的那個。

我排的不是隊，
是眼睜睜看著它變貴的過程。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態定價讓票價隨排隊即時上漲，還沒結帳就先漲好幾輪。傳給結帳看到價錢傻眼的朋友
variations: 帳單版：「進場前 1500，選位後 2200，結帳 2600。同一張票，愛得越久越貴。」

en.content:
I'm in the queue, and the price is climbing.

Before I even reach the seats,
it's gone up twice.
By the time I pick a spot,
the number isn't the one I saw walking in.

I'm not waiting in line.
I'm watching it get more expensive in real time.
en.editorNote: Dynamic pricing means the price ticks up while you wait in the queue, before you even check out. Send to the friend who got sticker-shocked at the seat map
variations: Receipt version: '$50 in the queue, $75 at the seat map, $88 at checkout. Same ticket — the longer you love it, the more it costs.'

items.sourceNote: 前工程師開發搶票外掛，用約 200 支手機一年半掃走逾 6 萬張票、非法獲利逾七千萬，實名制仍遭繞過

zh-tw.content:
新聞：前工程師寫外掛，
用兩百支手機搶了六萬張票，
一年半撈七千萬。

我用一支手機、一雙手，
搶了一年半，
零張。

原來我輸的不是手速，
是我只有兩隻手。
zh-tw.editorNote: 200 支手機外掛掃 6 萬張票的黃牛案，對比真人只有一雙手。傳給搶到懷疑人生的朋友合理化失敗
variations: 認命版：「他兩百支手機，我兩隻手。這場比賽從器材那關我就被淘汰了。」

en.content:
News: an ex-engineer built a bot,
grabbed 60,000 tickets on 200 phones,
and cleared millions in eighteen months.

I used one phone and two hands,
fought for eighteen months,
and got zero.

Turns out I didn't lose on speed.
I lost because I only have two hands.
en.editorNote: The 200-phone bot bust vs. a real human with two hands. Send to the friend spiraling after another shutout to reframe the loss
variations: Resigned version: 'He had 200 phones, I had two hands. I was eliminated at the equipment round.'

items.sourceNote: 警方提醒買到門票別急著曬照，票面 QR 碼若未遮蔽恐遭掃描盜用，陌生人可搶先掃碼入場

zh-tw.content:
搶到票太開心，
我把票拍照 PO 上網。

三秒後有人提醒我：
QR 碼露出來了。

然後我的票，
就這樣被陌生人
先掃進場了。

我終於搶到一次，
卻是幫別人搶的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 搶到票曬照卻露出 QR 碼被盜掃是真實災情。傳給正想 PO 票根炫耀的朋友當緊急煞車
variations: 警告版：「曬票之前先想清楚：那張照片裡最值錢的，不是你的笑容，是那個沒遮到的 QR 碼。」

en.content:
Finally got a ticket, so happy
I snapped a photo and posted it online.

Three seconds later someone warned me:
the QR code's showing.

And just like that,
a stranger scanned my ticket in
before I could.

I finally won one —
turns out I won it for someone else.
en.editorNote: Posting a ticket photo with the QR code exposed gets it scanned by strangers. Send to the friend about to flex their stub online as an emergency brake
variations: Warning version: 'Before you show off that ticket — the most valuable thing in the photo isn't your smile, it's the QR code you forgot to blur.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 大型巡演普遍導入動態定價，票價隨即時需求整天浮動，早上一個價下午一個價

zh-tw.content:
早上看票價 1800。
下午再看變 2400。

我沒有猶豫，
我只是在跟一個
會偷偷漲價的演算法談戀愛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態定價（票價整天浮動）是 2026 大型巡演的新常態。傳給早上猶豫、下午後悔的朋友
variations: 認命版：「我不是買不起，我是被演算法算準了會心軟。」

en.content:
Checked the price this morning: $60.
Checked again after lunch: $80.

I didn't hesitate.
I just fell in love
with an algorithm that quietly marks itself up.
en.editorNote: Dynamic pricing that drifts up through the day is the 2026 tour norm. Send to the friend who hesitated at breakfast and regretted it by dinner
variations: Resigned version: 'I can afford it. The algorithm just knew I'd cave.'

items.sourceNote: 部分演唱會導入答題過關制防黃牛，須先答對藝人冷知識才能進入購票流程

zh-tw.content:
搶票前要先答題：
「請問這位歌手第三張專輯第七首歌是什麼？」

我愛他愛了十年，
卻在這一題
被系統判定為
「不夠愛」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 答題過關制想擋黃牛，卻先考倒真粉。傳給卡在冷知識題目前面的朋友
variations: 諷刺版：「防黃牛答題：黃牛有小抄，真粉靠真心。結果小抄贏了。」

en.content:
Before you can buy, answer this:
'What's track seven on the artist's third album?'

I've loved them for ten years,
and the system just ruled
that I don't love them
enough.
en.editorNote: Trivia gates meant to stop bots end up stumping real fans first. Send to the friend frozen on a deep-cut quiz question
variations: Ironic version: 'Anti-scalper quiz: scalpers have cheat sheets, real fans have feelings. The cheat sheet won.'

items.sourceNote: 搶票須提早 24 小時以上加入會員並完成手機驗證，未事先驗證者當日直接卡關

zh-tw.content:
開賣前要提早 24 小時
加入會員、完成手機驗證。

我為了一場兩小時的演唱會，
提前一天
把自己註冊成
一個更完整的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 提早 24 小時會員加手機驗證是 2026 防黃牛前置門檻。傳給前一天就在乖乖填資料的朋友
variations: 吐槽版：「手機驗證碼收到那刻，我以為我在辦銀行帳戶，結果只是想聽個歌。」

en.content:
To buy, you must register
and verify your phone
twenty-four hours in advance.

For a two-hour show,
I spent a full day early
becoming a more fully documented
version of myself.
en.editorNote: 24-hour pre-registration and phone verification is the new 2026 anti-scalper gate. Send to the friend filling out forms the night before
variations: Snark version: 'Got the verification code and thought I was opening a bank account. Nope. Just wanted to hear a song.'

items.sourceNote: 拓元搶票攻略建議對準中原標準時間精準刷新，粉絲流行開賣前全裝置對時

zh-tw.content:
開賣前一分鐘，
我把電腦、手機、手錶
全部對準中原標準時間。

人生從沒這麼準時過。

可惜準時的是我，
不是我的手速。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開賣前全裝置對時是台灣搶票玄學儀式。傳給正在盯著原子鐘網站倒數的朋友
variations: 尊嚴版：「我對時對到秒。11:00:00 準時按下，11:00:00 準時看到售完。準時得很有尊嚴。」

en.content:
One minute before the sale,
I synced my laptop, phone, and watch
to the national atomic clock.

I've never been this punctual in my life.

Shame the punctuality was mine,
not my click speed.
en.editorNote: Syncing every device to the atomic clock is peak presale superstition. Send to the friend staring at a countdown site down to the millisecond
variations: Dignity version: 'Synced to the second. Clicked at 11:00:00 sharp. Saw sold out at 11:00:00 sharp. Dignified, at least.'

items.sourceNote: 粉絲為取得卡友優先購資格特地新辦信用卡，付了年費仍搶不到票

zh-tw.content:
為了拿到卡友優先購資格，
我辦了一張新的信用卡。

年費 3600，
首刷禮是一場
我最後還是沒搶到的演唱會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 為 presale 資格辦新卡卻仍落空是 2026 荒謬日常。傳給剛被推銷辦卡又沒搶到的朋友
variations: 結算版：「我沒得到票，倒是得到一張卡、一筆年費、跟一個更擁擠的錢包。」

en.content:
To unlock the cardholder presale,
I opened a brand-new credit card.

Annual fee: $120.
Signup gift: a concert
I still, ultimately, did not get into.
en.editorNote: Opening a whole credit line just for presale access and still whiffing is peak 2026 absurdity. Send to the friend who got upsold a card and still missed out
variations: Tally version: 'Didn't get the ticket. Did get a card, an annual fee, and a slightly fatter wallet full of regret.'

items.sourceNote: IVE 加場開賣一堆粉絲帳號被鎖求助，拓元回應「無誤判」「尚無經申訴證實系統誤判之案例」

zh-tw.content:
我帳號被鎖，
我去申訴。

他們回我四個字：
『系統無誤判。』

意思是——
有問題的不是系統，
是我這個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 售票系統「尚無誤判案例」的回應讓被鎖粉絲二度受傷。傳給正在寫申訴信第五封的朋友
variations: 認命版：「我不是被誤鎖，我是被正確地判定為不配。系統很準，準到我無話可說。」

en.content:
My account got locked.
I filed an appeal.

They replied:
'The system made no error.'

Meaning:
the problem isn't the system.
The problem is me.
en.editorNote: The 'our system is never wrong' reply adds insult to injury for locked-out fans. Send to a friend drafting appeal email #5
variations: Resigned version: 'I wasn't wrongly locked. I was correctly judged unworthy. The system's accurate — accurate enough to leave me speechless.'

items.sourceNote: BTS 高雄場全面實名制，同筆訂單其他票券須在 10 分鐘內輸入完整正確的入場者姓名，否則失單

zh-tw.content:
實名制新規則：
同行的票要在 10 分鐘內
輸入正確姓名。

我打錯一個字，
整筆訂單就沒了。

原來能不能看演唱會，
取決於我對朋友的名字
有多熟。
zh-tw.editorNote: 實名制要求限時填妥同行者姓名，打錯就失單，讓友情變成默寫測驗。傳給正在群組狂問朋友身分證名字的人
variations: 焦慮版：「10 分鐘、5 個名字、1 隻手抖。我不是在搶票，是在考默寫。」

en.content:
New real-name rule:
you've got ten minutes to enter
every companion's exact name.

One typo
and the whole order's gone.

Turns out getting into the show
depends on how well I know
my own friends' legal names.
en.editorNote: Real-name systems that demand every companion's full name in ten minutes turn friendship into a spelling test. Send to whoever's frantically DMing the group chat for legal names
variations: Anxious version: 'Ten minutes, five names, one shaky hand. This isn't a ticket sale, it's a pop quiz.'

items.sourceNote: 會員預購競爭者僅限會員，成功率號稱是全面開賣的三倍以上；粉絲繳會費仍難搶

zh-tw.content:
我花錢加入會員，
就為了搶票成功率
變成三倍。

三倍的意思是——

從『不可能』，
升級成『比較不可能』。
zh-tw.editorNote: 會員預購號稱成功率三倍，但基期太低仍難搶。傳給剛繳完會員費又落空的朋友
variations: 數學版：「本來 0.3%，三倍變 0.9%。我花錢把絕望，升級成高級一點的絕望。」

en.content:
I paid for a membership
just to triple my odds
of getting a ticket.

Triple means:

from 'impossible'
to 'slightly less impossible.'
en.editorNote: Member presales promise 3x better odds — off a base so low it barely moves the needle. Send to the friend who paid the fee and still whiffed
variations: Math version: 'Was 0.3%, tripled to 0.9%. I paid money to upgrade my despair to a premium tier.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7/3-7/12 七場開唱當月，沒票的粉絲被社群限時動態現場影片洗版

zh-tw.content:
七月到了。
他們真的開唱了。

我的限時動態，
全是別人的現場。

我一則接著一則點開，
像在看一場
我沒被邀請的人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 演唱會月一到，沒票的人被 IG 限動洗版，缺席感最重。傳給演唱會當晚一個人在家滑手機的朋友
variations: 自嘲版：「我沒去現場，但我把每個人的限動都看完了。以流量來算，我大概也算到場了。」

en.content:
July's here.
The shows are actually happening.

My feed is wall-to-wall
with everyone else's live clips.

I tap through story after story,
like watching a life
I wasn't invited to.
en.editorNote: When the show finally happens and your feed floods with everyone's footage, absence stings hardest. Send to the friend home alone on concert night
variations: Self-deprecating version: 'Didn't make it in person, but I watched every single story. By data usage alone, I basically attended.'

items.sourceNote: Queue-it 統計某熱門開賣 96% 流量來自機器人，330 萬次請求僅 13.8 萬來自真人

zh-tw.content:
搶票搶了三年，
我才明白一件事——

跟我搶的
從來不是別的粉絲。

是三百萬隻機器人，
跟一個手速比不過 F5 的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 熱門開賣有 96% 流量來自機器人，真人粉絲根本擠不進去。傳給每次都秒殺落空、開始懷疑人生的朋友
variations: 數據版：「三百三十萬次請求，只有十三萬是真人。我不是輸給運氣，是輸給一整座機器人工廠。」

en.content:
Took me three years of on-sales
to finally get it—

I was never racing
other fans.

I was racing three million bots,
with a refresh finger
that can't beat a script.
en.editorNote: In big on-sales up to 96% of traffic is bots — real fans can barely get through the door. Send to the friend who whiffs every time and is questioning reality
variations: Data version: '3.3 million requests, only 138,000 from humans. I didn't lose to bad luck. I lost to an entire bot farm.'

items.sourceNote: Oasis、Ed Sheeran、Harry Styles 演唱會作廢被判定屬於黃牛的門票

zh-tw.content:
聽說主辦開始
作廢黃牛的票了。

我一邊拍手叫好，
一邊偷偷檢查——

我那張加價買的，
該不會
也在名單上吧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 越來越多主辦直接作廢轉售票，爽了正義感卻也讓加價買票的人心驚。傳給忍不住從二手買票、現在天天怕被抓的朋友
variations: 心虛版：「主辦作廢黃牛票的新聞底下，我按了讚，然後默默把入場 QR code 又刷新了一次。」

en.content:
Word is the promoters
started voiding scalped tickets.

I'm clapping along—

while quietly checking
whether the one I overpaid for
might be on the list too.
en.editorNote: More promoters are canceling resold tickets outright — satisfying, until you're the one who paid over face. Send to the friend who caved and bought resale and now checks their QR code daily
variations: Guilty version: 'Liked the article about voided scalper tickets, then quietly refreshed my entry QR code one more time.'

items.sourceNote: Billie Eilish、Hozier、Noah Kahan 等採用 Ticketmaster Face Value Exchange 讓粉絲原價互轉

zh-tw.content:
終於有『原價轉讓』了。

不用加價，
不用私訊喊價，
不用擔心收到假票。

我盯著那個按鈕，
感動到快哭——

然後發現，
還是沒有人要放票。
zh-tw.editorNote: 原價轉讓機制讓粉絲互相安全交易，是搶票地獄裡少數的光。傳給苦等別人釋出原價票、卻一張都等不到的朋友
variations: 現實版：「原價轉讓區我開了一整天。票沒等到，倒是把重新整理練成反射動作。」

en.content:
Finally, a face-value exchange.

No markups,
no DM bidding wars,
no fear of fake tickets.

I stared at that button,
nearly in tears—

then realized
nobody's releasing any.
en.editorNote: Face-value exchanges let fans trade safely at cost — one of the few bright spots in ticketing hell. Send to the friend refreshing the resale page for a face-value drop that never comes
variations: Reality version: 'Watched the face-value exchange all day. No ticket showed up, but refreshing is now a reflex.'

items.sourceNote: 美國參議院聽證檢視售票與機器人轉售對粉絲影響；票面價與實付價落差成最大爭議

zh-tw.content:
票面寫著一個價，
結帳跳出另一個價。

中間那段差距，
沒有人解釋，
也沒有人負責。

我買的到底是門票，
還是一張
浮動的心情。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態定價讓票面價與實付價落差越來越大，粉絲花錢還搞不懂錢花去哪。傳給看到結帳金額嚇一跳的朋友
variations: 帳單版：「票面 1800，結帳 3200。多出來的 1400，主辦說是『市場機制』，我說是『我下個月的伙食』。」

en.content:
Face value says one number.
Checkout shows another.

Nobody explains the gap.
Nobody owns it.

Am I buying a ticket,
or a mood
that floats with the market?
en.editorNote: Dynamic pricing keeps widening the gap between face value and what you actually pay — you spend the money and still can't tell where it went. Send to the friend who flinched at the checkout total
variations: Bill version: 'Face value $60, checkout $110. That extra $50 is "market forces" to them and "next week's groceries" to me.'

items.sourceNote: 黃牛透過加入多個歌迷會、購買預購碼、建立大量假帳號系統性搶票

zh-tw.content:
黃牛加入了十個歌迷會，
買了二十組預購碼，
開了一百個假帳號。

我只有一顆
真心喜歡的心。

難怪搶輸——
我根本沒在同一個賽道上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 黃牛用多個歌迷會、大量預購碼與假帳號系統性掃票，真粉根本不對等。傳給只想單純看場演唱會、卻年年落空的朋友
variations: 認命版：「人家開一百個帳號，我連一個都懶得再刷新。這場比賽，我從報名那天就輸了。」

en.content:
The scalper joined ten fan clubs,
bought twenty presale codes,
spun up a hundred fake accounts.

All I brought
was one heart that actually likes the band.

No wonder I lost—
we were never in the same race.
en.editorNote: Scalpers game presales with multiple fan clubs, stockpiled codes, and hundreds of fake accounts — real fans aren't on a level field. Send to the friend who just wants to see one show and whiffs every year
variations: Resigned version: 'They ran a hundred accounts. I couldn't be bothered to refresh once. I lost this race the day I signed up.'

items.sourceNote: 美國參議院商務委員會推 TICKET Act，要求售票全額含手續費一次顯示

zh-tw.content:
聽說通過新法，
規定票價要『含所有費用一次顯示』。

我一度很感動——
終於有人替我把手續費攤開來看。

結果攤開來的那一刻，
我更買不起了。

原來透明的意思是，
連絕望都看得一清二楚。
zh-tw.editorNote: 隱藏費用透明化是 2026 售票新聞熱點。傳給那個結帳前要先深呼吸的朋友
variations: 精簡版：「以前是被藏起來的費用嚇到，現在是被攤開來的誠實嚇到。」

en.content:
They passed a bill —
sellers now have to show the full price,
every fee included, up front.

I was touched.
Someone finally laid it all out
where I could see it.

Then I saw it.
And I could afford it even less.

Turns out transparency just means
you get to watch your own despair in HD.
en.editorNote: The TICKET Act's all-in pricing push was a 2026 headline. Send to the friend who takes a deep breath before every checkout
variations: Short version: 'I used to be scared of the hidden fees. Now I'm scared of the honest ones.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 演唱會人臉辨識＋實名入場防黃牛報導

zh-tw.content:
入場要刷臉。

我在閘門前
先偷偷練習了一個
最自然的表情。

臉過了，
心跳沒過——

它悄悄告訴機器：
這個人手上這張票，
是原價的三倍。
zh-tw.editorNote: 人臉辨識入場是防黃牛新招。傳給那個花大錢還要裝沒事的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「刷臉那一秒我超鎮定，鎮定到不像一個剛付完三倍價的人。」

en.content:
Facial recognition at the gate.

Before the turnstile
I rehearsed
my most natural expression.

My face passed.
My heart rate didn't —

it quietly told the machine:
this one
paid three times face value.
en.editorNote: Face-scan entry is the new anti-scalper move. Send to the friend who overpaid and is trying very hard to look chill
variations: Extended: 'I stayed calm through the face scan. Too calm for someone who just paid triple.'

items.sourceNote: 遠見：實名制下代購／代搶費飆升至票面六成

zh-tw.content:
實名制上路，
代購沒有消失，
只是漲價了。

代購費喊到票面的六成。

我算一算——
與其付這筆錢，
不如當作
我又買了一張
一樣搶不到的票。
zh-tw.editorNote: 實名制反而讓代購費飆到票面六成的現象。傳給那個算完數學就想躺平的朋友
variations: 精簡版：「代購費六成，等於我付一張半的錢，看零場的演唱會。」

en.content:
Real-name rules kicked in.
Proxy buyers didn't vanish —
they just raised their rates.

The service fee is now sixty percent of face value.

I did the math.
For that price
I might as well buy
a second ticket
I'll also fail to get.
en.editorNote: Real-name systems pushed proxy fees toward 60% of face value. Send to the friend who did the math and now wants to lie down
variations: Short version: 'A sixty-percent proxy fee means I pay for a ticket and a half to see exactly zero shows.'

items.sourceNote: 實名制購票與入場規定：票綁定本人、不可轉讓

zh-tw.content:
實名制的票
綁死在我的名字上。

不能轉，不能賣，
也不能送。

然後那天我要加班。

一張只屬於我的票，
最後也只能
陪我一起
沒去成。
zh-tw.editorNote: 實名制不可轉讓，臨時去不了只能作廢的痛。傳給那個抽到票卻卡到班表的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「別人是搶不到票，我是搶到了，卻只能看著它過期。」

en.content:
A real-name ticket,
locked to my name.

Can't transfer, can't sell,
can't even gift it.

Then I got put on shift that night.

A ticket that belonged
only to me
stayed home
only with me.
en.editorNote: Non-transferable real-name tickets mean one schedule clash just wastes the seat. Send to the friend who finally got in, then got rostered for work
variations: Extended: 'Everyone else can't get a ticket. I got one — and got to watch it expire.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 五月天大巨蛋侏儸紀主題、票價 1525-5525 元報導

zh-tw.content:
這次主題是侏儸紀，
場上有 13 米的恐龍。

票價半個月薪水，
我付得心甘情願。

散場後我打開戶頭看了一眼——

今晚真正絕種的，
不是恐龍，
是我的存款。
zh-tw.editorNote: 五月天大巨蛋侏儸紀主題＋高票價的自嘲。傳給那個為了看恐龍要吃一個月泡麵的朋友
variations: 精簡版：「恐龍在台上復活了，我的錢包在台下滅絕了。」

en.content:
This tour's theme is Jurassic —
a thirteen-metre dinosaur on stage.

The ticket cost half a paycheck.
I paid it gladly.

After the show I checked my balance —

the only thing that went extinct tonight
wasn't the dinosaur.
It was my savings.
en.editorNote: Self-deprecating take on the Jurassic-themed dome show and its prices. Send to the friend eating instant noodles all month to fund one dinosaur
variations: Short version: 'The dinosaur came back to life. My wallet went extinct.'

items.sourceNote: 拓元系統偵測非人類手速鎖帳號，IVE 加場一堆粉絲帳號被鎖急求助

zh-tw.content:
系統說我的手速
『不像人類』，
把我的帳號鎖了。

拜託，
我熬夜三天、練了一個禮拜，
就是為了這一刻
變成一台機器。

結果它嫌我太像機器。
zh-tw.editorNote: 拓元偵測非人類手速會鎖帳號，苦練搶票反被判定成黃牛的荒謬。傳給那個帳號被鎖在到處求助的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「我努力到不像人類，系統就當我不是人。」

en.content:
The system said my clicking speed
'wasn't human'
and locked my account.

Excuse me —
I pulled three all-nighters and trained for a week
just to become a machine
for this exact moment.

And now it's complaining I'm too much like one.
en.editorNote: Anti-bot systems lock accounts for 'inhuman' speed — punishing the fans who practiced hardest. Send to the friend whose account just got frozen
variations: Extended: 'I trained until I stopped being human, so the system decided I wasn't one.'

items.sourceNote: 熱門場次開賣 96% 流量是機器人，330 萬筆請求僅 13.8 萬來自真人

zh-tw.content:
新聞說這場開賣，
九成六的流量
都是機器人。

三百萬筆請求裡，
只有十三萬個是真人。

我沒搶到票，
但至少我確定
我是那十三萬分之一的人類。
zh-tw.editorNote: 熱門場次逾九成流量是機器人搶票，真人根本擠不進去。傳給那個沒搶到還開始懷疑自己是不是人的朋友
variations: 精簡版：「跟我搶票的不是歌迷，是一整個機房。」

en.content:
The report said 96% of the traffic
was bots.

Out of 3.3 million requests,
only 138,000 came from real people.

I didn't get a ticket.
But at least I can confirm
I was one of the 138,000 humans.
en.editorNote: When most of the traffic is bots, real fans never had a chance. Send to the friend who lost out and is now questioning their own humanity
variations: Short version: 'I wasn't competing with fans. I was competing with a server farm.'

items.sourceNote: Spotify Reserved 等串流忠誠度計畫，用收聽數據為鐵粉保留席次

zh-tw.content:
聽說現在靠串流紀錄
幫最死忠的粉絲留位子。

我整年單曲循環三千次，
通勤聽、洗澡聽、
做夢也聽。

結果留位子的名單裡
沒有我。

原來我不是死忠，
我只是耳鳴。
zh-tw.editorNote: 串流平台用收聽數據判定鐵粉優先購，狂聽一年卻沒入選的心酸。傳給那個歌單裡只有一個歌手的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「我把他聽成年度最佳，他把我聽成陌生人。」

en.content:
Apparently they now reserve seats
for the most loyal fans,
based on streaming.

I looped that album 3,000 times this year —
on the commute, in the shower, in my sleep.

And my name
wasn't on the reserved list.

Turns out I'm not a superfan.
I'm just tinnitus.
en.editorNote: Streaming-loyalty programs promise fans first dibs — until a year of obsessive listening still doesn't make the cut. Send to the friend whose playlist is one artist on repeat
variations: Extended: 'I streamed him into my year-end top artist. He streamed me into a stranger.'

items.sourceNote: Oasis、Ed Sheeran、Harry Styles 等主辦查獲並作廢轉售黃牛票

zh-tw.content:
聽說這次主辦
直接把黃牛的票
通通作廢。

黃牛加價十二倍賣出去，
買家開開心心
進場前
票變一張廢紙。

我沒搶到票，
心情卻莫名其妙
好了起來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 主辦方查獲並作廢轉售票，黃牛與買家雙輸的幸災樂禍。傳給那個一起沒搶到票、需要一點正義感的朋友
variations: 精簡版：「我沒進場，但黃牛也沒賺到，扯平了。」

en.content:
Heard the promoter
voided every scalper ticket this time.

Scalpers marked them up 12x,
and right before the buyers walked in,
the tickets turned to scrap paper.

I didn't get a ticket either.
But somehow
I feel great.
en.editorNote: Promoters voiding resold tickets means scalpers and their buyers both lose — sweet schadenfreude. Send to the friend who also struck out and needs a little justice
variations: Short version: 'I didn't get in. But the scalper didn't get paid. Call it even.'

items.sourceNote: BTS 高雄站等場次每張門票外加系統服務費 NT$200

zh-tw.content:
一張票要外加
兩百塊系統服務費。

服務？
我排了兩小時、
被踢出去三次、
最後還沒買到。

這兩百塊
到底是服務我
還是服務系統？
zh-tw.editorNote: 每張票外加系統服務費，換來的卻是卡頓與被踢出的體驗。傳給那個付了服務費還是空手而歸的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「我付了服務費，享受的是被系統服務出場的體驗。」

en.content:
Each ticket comes with
a $200 'service fee.'

Service?
I queued two hours, got kicked out three times,
and still walked away empty-handed.

So that $200 —
was it serving me,
or serving the server?
en.editorNote: Mandatory per-ticket service fees buy you lag and lockouts, not service. Send to the friend who paid the fee and still came home with nothing
variations: Short version: 'I paid a service fee to be served an error page.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 搶票攻略：拓元驗證碼為扭曲英數字、通常不分大小寫，看到什麼打什麼省關鍵一秒

zh-tw.content:
驗證碼那串字
到底是 O 還是 0，
是 l 還是 1，
是 B 還是 8。

我猜對了三次，
第四次系統告訴我
票沒了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 扭曲驗證碼是搶票路上最後一道、也最靠運氣的關卡。傳給那個因為看錯一個字母而錯過的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「我不是視力測驗沒過，我是搶票沒過。」
簡短版：「輸入的不是驗證碼，是我的手氣。」

en.content:
Is that an O or a 0,
an l or a 1,
a B or an 8?

I guessed right three times.
The fourth time,
the site told me the show was sold out.
en.editorNote: Distorted CAPTCHAs are the last and most luck-based gate in any ticket rush. Send to the friend who lost their spot over one misread letter
variations: Extended: 'I didn't fail an eye exam. I failed the ticket exam.'
Short version: 'That wasn't a CAPTCHA. That was a coin flip.'

items.sourceNote: IVE 加場開賣，大量粉絲帳號被鎖急求助；拓元稱系統會標記「不像人類能做到」的購票模式

zh-tw.content:
系統把我的帳號鎖了，
理由是我手速
「不像人類做得到」。

謝謝，
這是我這輩子
第一次被誇快。

只可惜是被機器人
誤認成同類。
zh-tw.editorNote: 反黃牛演算法連真人一起誤鎖，是 2026 搶票新型委屈。傳給那個手速太快反被當機器人的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「我練了三年手速，換來系統認證我是機器人。」
簡短版：「被誇快，然後被鎖，這就是我的搶票人生。」

en.content:
The system locked my account
because my speed was
'not something a human could do.'

Thanks.
That's the first time
anyone's called me fast.

Shame it was a bot filter
mistaking me for its own kind.
en.editorNote: Anti-bot algorithms now lock out real fans for being too quick — the newest flavor of ticket-rush injustice. Send to the friend who got flagged as a bot for trying too hard
variations: Extended: 'Trained my clicking speed for years. The reward? The site certified me as a robot.'
Short version: 'Complimented on my speed, then locked out for it. Ticketing in a nutshell.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 搶票攻略指出，除了手速，網速與 Ping 值才是決定成功的關鍵

zh-tw.content:
大家都在練手速，
沒人告訴我
真正輸的是網速。

我的手是閃電，
我的網路
是撥接年代的鬼魂。
zh-tw.editorNote: 手速再快也贏不過 Ping 值，這是搶票殘酷的物理定律。傳給那個怪自己不夠快、其實是被網路害的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「別人搶票靠光纖，我搶票靠祈禱。」
簡短版：「輸的不是我的手，是我家的 Wi-Fi。」

en.content:
Everyone trains their clicking speed.
Nobody warned me
the real loser is your connection.

My hands are lightning.
My internet is
a ghost from the dial-up era.
en.editorNote: No amount of finger speed beats a bad ping — the cruel physics of every ticket rush. Send to the friend blaming their reflexes when it was really the router
variations: Extended: 'Other people buy tickets on fiber. I buy tickets on prayer.'
Short version: 'It wasn't my hands that lost. It was my Wi-Fi.'

items.sourceNote: 官方原價轉售（Face Value Exchange）機制存在，但票券仍出現在 StubHub 等平台被高價轉售

zh-tw.content:
官方說有原價轉售平台，
讓大家安心。

結果我的位子
出現在黃牛網站上，
加價三倍，
還標「稀有好位」。

稀有的不是位子，
是還相信規則的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 官方防黃牛機制與黃牛平台並存的荒謬，是 2026 全球共通的無力感。傳給那個乖乖排隊、卻看到同一張票在別處加價的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「原價轉售是給守規則的人，加價轉售是給守荷包的黃牛。」
簡短版：「規則保護的從來不是我，是黃牛的利潤。」

en.content:
They said there's an official
face-value resale exchange.
Very reassuring.

Then my seat showed up
on a scalper site,
marked up 3x,
labeled 'rare great view.'

The rare thing isn't the seat.
It's me, still trusting the rules.
en.editorNote: Face-value exchanges and scalper markups coexisting is the universal 2026 helplessness. Send to the friend who queued honestly and then saw the same ticket flipped elsewhere
variations: Extended: 'Face-value resale is for the rule-followers. Markup resale is for the scalpers guarding their profit.'
Short version: 'The rules never protected me. They protected the scalper's margin.'

items.sourceNote: 動態定價已成大型巡演常態，被批評把居高不下的轉售價格直接轉嫁給歌迷

zh-tw.content:
動態定價的意思是：
我越想要，
它就越貴。

我的熱情
被系統即時報價，
每一次刷新，
都在幫我的錢包倒數。
zh-tw.editorNote: 動態定價把歌迷的渴望變成漲價理由，是 2026 最令人窒息的購票機制。傳給那個看著價格越刷越高、越想放棄的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「以前貴的是位子，現在貴的是我對這場的執念。」
簡短版：「動態定價：專門懲罰真心喜歡的人。」

en.content:
Dynamic pricing means:
the more I want it,
the more it costs.

My enthusiasm
gets quoted in real time.
Every refresh
is a countdown on my wallet.
en.editorNote: Dynamic pricing turns a fan's longing into a reason to charge more — 2026's most suffocating buying mechanic. Send to the friend watching the price climb with every refresh
variations: Extended: 'It used to be the seat that was expensive. Now it's my obsession with the show.'
Short version: 'Dynamic pricing: a tax on actually caring.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7 場拓元開賣，熱門場開賣後幾分鐘售罄，候位室排隊人數龐大

zh-tw.content:
候位室說我是第 3,800 位。

我刷新了一下，
變成第 12,000 位。

原來排隊
也會通貨膨脹。
zh-tw.editorNote: 候位室名次不減反增，是拓元與各大售票系統最崩潰的瞬間。傳給那個眼睜睜看著自己名次倒退嚕的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「我不是在排隊，我是在被系統加塞。」
簡短版：「名次會漲，希望會跌。」

en.content:
The waiting room says I'm number 3,800.

I refreshed once.
Now I'm number 12,000.

Turns out queues
have inflation too.
en.editorNote: A queue position that climbs instead of dropping is the purest form of ticketing despair — works for Ticketmaster's Verified Fan queues too. Send to the friend watching their number go backwards
variations: Extended: 'I'm not in line. I'm being cut in front of, live.'
Short version: 'The number goes up. The hope goes down.'

items.sourceNote: 搶票建議提前綁卡測速、進候位室，熱門場開賣數分鐘內完售

zh-tw.content:
開賣前一天，
我綁卡、測速、練習點滑鼠，
連呼吸都在計時。

備戰程度
比我準備任何一場考試都認真。

結果三秒完售，
連按鈕都沒摸到。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開賣前綁卡測速、模擬點擊是台灣搶票族的儀式，卻常常敗給三秒完售。傳給那個熬夜備戰卻連按鈕都沒碰到的戰友
variations: 延伸版：「我為這場練的手速，考駕照都用不到。」
簡短版：「準備了一整晚，輸在第三秒。」

en.content:
The night before,
I linked my card, ran speed tests,
rehearsed my mouse clicks,
timed my own breathing.

I prepped harder than for any exam.

Sold out in three seconds.
Never even touched the button.
en.editorNote: Pre-sale prep rituals — saved cards, autofill, click drills — that still lose to a three-second sellout. Send to the friend who pulled an all-nighter and never reached checkout
variations: Extended: 'The reflexes I trained for this? Wasted. Even my driving test didn't need them.'
Short version: 'Prepped all night. Lost in second three.'

items.sourceNote: 白金票（Platinum）與動態定價把加價變成官方定價機制，被批評與黃牛無異

zh-tw.content:
官方推出「白金票」，
說是給最想看的粉絲。

翻譯：
加價加到跟黃牛一樣，
只是這次
漲價的是官方本人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 白金票、動態定價把加價變成官方行為，讓歌迷分不清誰才是黃牛。傳給那個發現官方定價比黃牛還狠的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「以前黃牛偷偷加價，現在官方光明正大加價。」
簡短版：「最大的黃牛，有時候就是售票的那個。」

en.content:
They launched 'Platinum' tickets,
supposedly for the biggest fans.

Translation:
marked up like a scalper,
except this time
the one gouging you is official.
en.editorNote: Platinum tickets and dynamic pricing turn markups into official policy — now you can't tell who the real scalper is. Send to the friend who found the official price beat the resale price
variations: Extended: 'Scalpers used to mark it up in the shadows. Now the seller does it in broad daylight.'
Short version: 'Sometimes the biggest scalper is the box office.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋 7/3 起連唱 7 場，熱門場常於開賣後加場，加場亦迅速完售

zh-tw.content:
官方宣布加場，
我以為這是希望。

開賣三秒，
加的那場
也一起被秒殺。

加的是場次，
不是我的機會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 加場曾是沒搶到的人最後的希望，卻常常一樣秒殺。傳給那個聽到加場先歡呼、再被秒殺打回原形的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「加場加的是主辦的收入，不是我的座位。」
簡短版：「多加一場，多輸一次。」

en.content:
They announced an extra show.
I thought it was hope.

Sold out in three seconds.
The added date
vanished with all the rest.

They added a show,
not a chance for me.
en.editorNote: Extra dates used to be the last hope for the shut-out — until they sell out just as fast. Send to the friend who cheered at the announcement and then got shut out again
variations: Extended: 'The extra show added revenue for the promoter, not a seat for me.'
Short version: 'One more show. One more loss.'

items.sourceNote: 五月天大巨蛋站主題走侏儸紀路線，主打「與龍共舞、13 米恐龍超近震撼」

zh-tw.content:
這次主題是侏儸紀，
號稱與龍共舞。

我在候位室排到
恐龍都復活了，
還是沒排到我。

共舞的不是龍，
是我跟系統的無限迴圈。
zh-tw.editorNote: 呼應五月天大巨蛋侏儸紀主題的自嘲哏，把漫長候位化成恐龍梗。傳給那個排隊排到天荒地老的朋友，苦中作樂
variations: 延伸版：「恐龍都等到絕種再進化了，我的名次還在原地。」
簡短版：「與龍共舞，先從跟系統共舞開始。」

en.content:
The theme this time is Jurassic —
officially, 'dancing with dinosaurs.'

I queued so long
the dinosaurs came back to life,
and still didn't reach checkout.

The dance isn't with a dinosaur.
It's me and the server, on infinite loop.
en.editorNote: A self-deprecating riff on the Jurassic stage theme, turning an endless queue into a dinosaur joke. Send to the friend who's been waiting since the age of the dinosaurs — laughing to keep from crying
variations: Extended: 'The dinosaurs went extinct, evolved, and came back. My queue number hasn't moved.'
Short version: 'Dancing with dinosaurs starts with slow-dancing the server.'

items.sourceNote: BTS 高雄場全面實名制，第一張票自動帶入購票者姓名且不可修改，入場須核對本人證件

zh-tw.content:
全面實名制，
第一張票自動帶入我的名字，
而且不可修改。

所以我搶到的那張，
注定只能是我去。

系統把我綁在
這場我等了十年的演出上，
這是我這輩子
最甘願的一次不可修改。
zh-tw.editorNote: 把實名制「不可修改」的冰冷規則翻成告白，適合搶到票、卻被朋友唸「不能讓給我」的時候發。也可以在實名制場次開賣前當作提醒文
variations: 延伸版：「別人談的是可撤銷的關係，我談的是不可修改的實名制。」
簡短版：「不可修改，剛好也是我對他的態度。」

en.content:
Full name-locked ticketing.
The first ticket auto-fills my name,
and it can't be changed.

So the one I fought for
can only ever be mine to use.

The system tied me
to a show I waited ten years for.
It's the one thing in my life
I'm happy to have locked in.
en.editorNote: Turns the cold 'non-editable' rule of name-locked ticketing into a love note. Good for when you got a ticket and a friend keeps asking you to transfer it, or as a heads-up post before a name-locked onsale
variations: Extended: 'Other people are in relationships they can cancel. I'm in one that's name-locked and non-refundable.'
Short version: 'Non-editable. Same as how I feel about him.'

items.sourceNote: 評論指出黃牛票賣不完可退回主辦，退票成本僅約一成，實名制難以完全嚇阻

zh-tw.content:
黃牛囤了三十張賣不完，
退回去只賠一成。

我一張都沒搶到，
卻整個禮拜都在難過。

他的風險有上限，
我的失落沒有。
zh-tw.editorNote: 點出黃牛退票成本低、粉絲情緒成本高的不對等。適合在轉售亂象新聞底下留言，或傳給罵了一整晚黃牛的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「他把票當庫存，我把票當那一天。」
簡短版：「他退貨只賠一成，我退不掉整個期待。」

en.content:
The scalper hoards thirty,
dumps what he can't sell,
and eats a ten percent fee.

I got zero,
and I've been sad about it all week.

His downside has a cap.
Mine doesn't.
en.editorNote: Names the asymmetry: scalpers return unsold stock cheaply while fans pay in feelings. Good under a resale-scandal post, or for the friend who's been ranting about bots all night
variations: Extended: 'To him it's inventory. To me it was going to be the best night of the year.'
Short version: 'He can return his tickets. I can't return the hope.'

items.sourceNote: 攻略指出提前註冊會員取得預購資格，競爭者較少，成功率約為全面開賣的三倍

zh-tw.content:
攻略說先入會，
預購成功率是全面開賣的三倍。

我加入了七個會員、
付了四筆年費、
收了兩百封電子報。

三倍的成功率，
乘以我的運氣，
還是零。
zh-tw.editorNote: 獻給為了預購碼把各家會員都辦了一輪的人。適合在會費扣款簡訊跳出來的那一刻發，或回覆那個叫你「先辦會員啦」的朋友
variations: 延伸版：「我不是歌迷，我是七個售票平台的年繳用戶。」
簡短版：「三倍成功率，零乘三還是零。」

en.content:
The guide said join the fan club —
presale odds are three times better.

So I joined seven memberships,
paid four annual fees,
and got two hundred newsletters.

Three times the odds,
multiplied by my luck,
is still zero.
en.editorNote: For anyone who signed up for every fan club just to chase a presale code. Post it the moment the renewal charge hits, or send it to the friend who told you to 'just join the membership'
variations: Extended: 'I'm not a fan. I'm an annual subscriber to seven ticketing platforms.'
Short version: 'Triple the odds. Zero times three is still zero.'

items.sourceNote: 搶票攻略建議事前綁定信用卡、測試網速、熟悉驗證流程，熱門場數分鐘內售罄

zh-tw.content:
為了那三秒鐘，
我提前一個月
綁好卡、換了網路、
把座位圖背起來，
還練習打驗證碼。

開賣當天，
我準備得比人生任何一場考試都認真。

三秒後，
售完。

我從來不知道
這麼努力
可以這麼快結束。
zh-tw.editorNote: 寫給把搶票當國考在準備的人。適合開賣結束後 PO 在限動，配一張空白的購票頁截圖
variations: 延伸版：「我準備了一個月，系統只給我三秒鐘作答。」
簡短版：「準備一個月，結束三秒鐘。」

en.content:
For those three seconds,
I spent a month
saving my card, upgrading my wifi,
memorizing the seat map,
and drilling captcha typing.

On sale day
I was more prepared
than for any exam I've ever taken.

Three seconds later:
sold out.

I never knew
trying this hard
could be over this fast.
en.editorNote: For everyone who preps for an onsale like it's a licensing exam. Post it right after the sale closes, paired with a screenshot of the empty cart
variations: Extended: 'I studied for a month. The system gave me three seconds to answer.'
Short version: 'One month of prep. Three seconds of sale.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 巴威颱風掃到多場演唱會，五月天大巨蛋宣布延期、改期併場

zh-tw.content:
搶了三個月的票，
終於熬到開唱前一天。

然後氣象局說：
颱風要來了。

我贏了拓元，
贏了黃牛，
贏了三萬個手速比我快的人——
最後，
輸給一個低氣壓。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 巴威颱風掃到好幾場，延期取消一片。傳給那個票搶到、假請好、行李都收好，卻被氣象預報打敗的朋友
variations: 精簡版：「我打贏了所有人類，輸給了一朵雲。」
補刀：「三個月的努力，敵不過一句『不排除放假』。」

en.content:
Three months fighting for the ticket.
Made it all the way to the night before.

Then the forecast:
a typhoon's coming.

I beat the ticketing site.
I beat the scalpers.
I beat thirty thousand faster fingers —
and then
lost to a low-pressure system.
en.editorNote: In 2026, Typhoon Bavi wiped out or delayed a string of shows. Send to the friend who got the ticket, booked the days off, packed the bag — and got beaten by a weather map
variations: Short version: 'I defeated all of humanity and lost to a cloud.'
Twist: 'Three months of effort, undone by the words ‘storm day likely.’'

items.sourceNote: 2026/7 演唱會因颱風取消，主辦全額退票並補償退票手續費與交通住宿，被稱最高賠付標準

zh-tw.content:
演唱會因颱風取消。
主辦超佛：
票錢全退、
退票手續費照補、
連機票飯店都賠。

他們什麼都退給我了，

除了我那三個月
每天倒數的心情。
zh-tw.editorNote: 有場次全退還補償交通住宿，被封「最高賠付標準」。這句送給拿到全額退款、卻退不回期待的人
variations: 延伸：「錢會回來，假不會回來，那個晚上更不會回來。」
簡短版：「全額退款，唯獨退不了我的期待。」

en.content:
The show got cancelled for the typhoon.
The promoter was unbelievably generous:
full refund,
refund fees covered,
even flights and hotels reimbursed.

They gave me back everything —

except the three months
I spent counting down to it.
en.editorNote: When a tour reimburses flights and hotels on top of the ticket, people call it 'the highest compensation standard.' For the fan who got every dollar back but can't get the anticipation back
variations: Extended: 'The money comes back. The vacation days don't. That night really doesn't.'
Short version: 'Full refund. The one thing they couldn't refund was the anticipation.'

items.sourceNote: 近年演唱會現場「一片手機海」爭議：前排全程舉手機錄影擋住後方視野

zh-tw.content:
我搶了三個月，
終於站進場內。

抬頭一看——
前面那個人
全程把手機舉得比誰都高。

我花半個月薪水，
買到的是
一場別人手機螢幕裡的演唱會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 「一片手機海」是這幾年現場最大爭議。傳給那個好不容易進場、視野卻被前排手機完全擋死的苦主
variations: 補刀：「他錄的畫面搞不好比我肉眼還清楚，我要不要直接跟他要檔案。」
簡短版：「我來看演唱會，結果看了三小時直播。」

en.content:
Three months of fighting.
I finally made it onto the floor.

Looked up —
and the person in front of me
held a phone higher than anyone all night.

I spent half a paycheck
to watch the whole concert
on a stranger's screen.
en.editorNote: The 'sea of phones' is the biggest live-show gripe of the decade. Send to the friend whose hard-won view got completely blocked by the row in front
variations: Twist: 'Their footage is probably sharper than my actual eyes. Should I just ask them to AirDrop it?'
Short version: 'I came for a concert and watched a three-hour livestream instead.'

items.sourceNote: 2026 無手機演唱會增加，入場鎖手機；但電子票是手機內的動態 QR，形成矛盾

zh-tw.content:
這場搞無手機政策，
進場前手機要鎖進袋子。

可是我的票，
是手機裡那張一直變的動態 QR。

所以我得先用手機證明我能進場，
再把手機交出去，
證明我可以不用手機。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 無手機演唱會越來越多，偏偏電子票又鎖在手機裡。這種自打嘴巴的荒謬，傳給排隊排到滿頭問號的朋友
variations: 精華：「系統要我用手機，證明我不需要手機。」
延伸：「鎖手機的那一刻，我的票跟我的臉一起被收走了。」

en.content:
This show went phone-free.
You lock your phone in a pouch at the door.

Except my ticket
is the rotating QR code inside that phone.

So first I use the phone to prove I can get in,
then I hand the phone over
to prove I can live without it.
en.editorNote: Phone-free concerts are spreading in 2026, but the ticket still lives locked inside the phone. For the friend stuck in the entry line doing a full double-take at the logic
variations: Distilled: 'The system needs my phone to prove I don't need my phone.'
Extended: 'The moment they pouched my phone, my ticket and my face went in with it.'
